sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Honda Launches a Scooter Result of the Combination of PCX and Vario, Price Rp33 Million
feed.summary: Honda has launched the NS150ES 2026 scooter in China, blending the comfort of a touring scooter with the agility of a sports bike, visually reminiscent of a combination between Honda's PCX and Vario models. Priced from approximately Rp33 million, it is powered by a 149cc engine and features a premium design, practical elements like an 8-liter fuel tank, and advanced options such as a dashcam and smartphone connectivity in its Pro variant. This model aims to attract the Asian market by offering a new niche that balances both performance and comfort.

feed.title: Vanguard (QBTS) reports 18.65M shares, 5.08% stake in D‑Wave
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a significant 5.08% stake in D-Wave Quantum Inc. (QBTS), holding 18.65 million shares as per a recent Schedule 13G SEC filing. This filing, made on April 29, 2026, indicates Vanguard's passive institutional ownership with sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 2.8 million shares, aggregating holdings from various Vanguard-managed funds and affiliates. The disclosure provides transparency on the ownership landscape without suggesting any activist intent.

feed.title: Palvella Therapeutics to Host First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Corporate Update Conference Call on May 7, 2026
feed.summary: Palvella Therapeutics announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Thursday, May 7, 2026. Management will host a conference call on the same day at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results and provide a corporate update. Investors can access the webcast or join by phone using the provided details.

feed.title: How Amex is Using GenAI to Augment Human Service for the Platinum Card Customers
feed.summary: American Express is integrating GenAI into its Platinum Card customer service to enhance the human touch rather than replace it. The "Travel Counselor Assist" program utilizes AI to streamline routine tasks, freeing up human consultants to focus on complex bookings and critical "moments of truth" for premium members. This approach has already reduced customer request resolution time and aims to improve overall customer satisfaction and consultant efficiency across 19 countries.

feed.title: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) Trading 8.6% Higher After Better-Than-Expected Earnings
feed.summary: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) shares surged by 8.6% following a better-than-expected earnings announcement, with the company reporting $1.43 EPS against an estimated $0.52. The firm also raised its full-year 2026 guidance, citing booming demand for data center capacity driven by AI workloads. Despite strong performance, some investors are monitoring the reported low net margin and negative return on equity.

feed.title: BMS positions Cobenfy as safer alternative ahead of pivotal Alzheimer’s psychosis readout
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb is promoting its schizophrenia drug Cobenfy as a potentially safer treatment for Alzheimer's disease psychosis, a condition affecting 30-50% of Alzheimer's patients for which no approved treatments currently exist. Unlike existing antipsychotics and some Alzheimer's therapies that carry boxed warnings for elderly patients, Cobenfy does not have such warnings, making safety a key differentiator. The company is awaiting pivotal Phase 3 ADEPT-2 study data later this year, which was delayed in late 2025 due to "irregularities" at some study sites.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Lennox International to $600 From $592
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for Lennox International (LII) from $592 to $600. This news was published on April 30, 2026, at 10:32 am EDT. Lennox International is a provider of climate control solutions, manufacturing products for heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration markets.

feed.title: Teledyne unifies ChartWorld, Raymarine Commercial under single navigation brand
feed.summary: Teledyne Technologies Inc. has consolidated its ChartWorld and Raymarine Commercial entities into a single global navigation brand, Raymarine Commercial. This integration brings together digital navigation services, hardware, and support, aiming to streamline the delivery of navigation systems and services to commercial vessel operators. The move is intended to better serve customers as the maritime industry transitions to more connected, data-driven, and regulated operating environments.

feed.title: Verity Asset Management Inc. Sells 2,317 Shares of Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT
feed.summary: Verity Asset Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Lockheed Martin Corporation by 47.2% in Q4, selling 2,317 shares and retaining 2,587 shares valued at $1.251 million. This comes after Lockheed Martin missed recent quarterly earnings and revenue estimates, although the company secured a $1.13 billion HIMARS production contract and has a strong order backlog. Analysts currently have an average "Hold" rating for the stock with a target price of $632.58, citing peer performance and policy risks as potential short-term pressures.

feed.title: Spectrum Financial Alliance Ltd LLC Buys 11,176 Shares of Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT

Lockheed Martin won a $1.13 billion HIMARS contract and is involved in next-generation aerospace programs, but missed quarterly EPS estimates and holds a "Hold" consensus analyst rating.

feed.title: Gilead Sciences, Inc. $GILD Shares Sold by Verity Asset Management Inc.
feed.summary: Verity Asset Management Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Gilead Sciences by almost 50%, selling 10,237 shares and leaving it with a 10,357-share holding valued at $1.27 million. Despite this institutional sale, Gilead shows near-term growth catalysts, including FDA priority review for an HIV regimen and a $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx. The company also raised its quarterly dividend, and analysts maintain a bullish average price target of $157.35, even as insiders like the CEO and CFO have been net sellers.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management holds 7.47% of Howmet Aerospace (NYSE: HWM)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a passive stake of 7.47% in Howmet Aerospace (NYSE: HWM), holding 29,982,753 shares of common stock. feed.title: McDonald’s lawsuit by two former Black executives to go to trial
feed.summary: A lawsuit filed by two former Black senior executives, Victoria Guster-Hines and Domineca Neal, against McDonald’s USA for alleged racial discrimination and a hostile work environment is proceeding to trial on September 14 in federal court in Chicago. The lawsuit, initially filed in January 2020, alleges that the executives experienced discriminatory practices, including demotions as part of a "ruthless purge" of African Americans from senior corporate ranks, and unlawful termination for Neal. While allegations of racial discrimination and retaliation against McDonald’s Corp. and its CEO were dismissed, the case against McDonald’s USA for hostile work environment and unlawful retaliation remains.

feed.title: Rexford Industrial Realty (REXR) FFO Holds At US$148 Million And Tests Bullish Cash Flow Narratives
feed.summary: Rexford Industrial Realty's Q1 2026 results showed FFO holding at US$148 million, but net margins compressed to 22.1% from 28.3% the prior year, challenging some bullish narratives. While trailing FFO remains over US$500 million, the 4.9% dividend yield is not well covered by free cash flow. The company trades at a premium P/E of 36.1x compared to peers, and combined with softer margins and tight dividend coverage, it raises questions about the sustainability of its profitability and valuation.

feed.title: How Strong Q1 Results and New Lending Push Will Impact VICI Properties (VICI) Investors
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. reported strong Q1 2026 results with increased revenue and net income, exceeding earnings per share expectations. The company also raised its AFFO guidance and announced significant growth initiatives, including a US$1.50 billion mezzanine loan for the One Beverly Hills project and a planned Canadian casino portfolio acquisition, solidifying its dual role as a landlord and capital provider in experiential real estate. Investors should consider how this expanded mezzanine lending, while supporting growth, introduces new risks related to project execution and credit quality.

feed.title: Is Capri Sun Hydrate a Turning Point in Kraft Heinz's (KHC) Health-Focused Brand Strategy?
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz's Capri Sun brand recently launched Capri Sun Hydrate, a new electrolyte drink for kids with reduced sugar and no artificial ingredients. This innovation aligns with Kraft Heinz's strategy to refresh its major brands through health-focused products, disciplined marketing, and improved execution in North America. While this launch supports the narrative of brand rebuilding, its impact on stabilizing volumes and margins, and closing the innovation gap with competitors, remains to be seen.

feed.title: WoodTrust Financial Corp Buys 15,069 Shares of Tyler Technologies, Inc. $TYL
feed.summary: WoodTrust Financial Corp significantly increased its stake in Tyler Technologies by 2,318.3%, adding 15,069 shares to reach a total of 15,719 shares valued at $7.135 million. This comes as Tyler Technologies reported a Q1 EPS beat at $3.09 but missed revenue expectations at $613.5 million. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target indicating potential upside from the current share price.

feed.title: A.O. Smith stock hits 52-week low at $61.99 By Investing.com

feed.title: Deere & Co Stock (DE) Moved Up by 3.50% on Apr 30: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Deere & Co (DE) stock rose by 3.50% on April 30, 2026, driven by positive analyst sentiment, strong Q1 2026 earnings, and a favorable long-term industry outlook. Despite minor analyst forecast trims and anticipated Q2 earnings per share decline, the company's raised full-year guidance and strategic advancements in precision agriculture are bolstering investor confidence, positioning it well in a growing market. Technically, the stock shows mixed signals with a sell indication from MACD but an oversold condition from Williams %R, while fundamentally it ranks high in its industry for revenue and net profit.

feed.title: Salesforce Inc Stock (CRM) Moved Down by 3.87% on Apr 30: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Salesforce Inc (CRM) stock declined by 3.87% on April 30, driven by market fears regarding AI disruption to SaaS models, a lawsuit filed by its subsidiary Slack against Microsoft, and institutional investors reducing their stakes. Despite positive company announcements like stock repurchases and expanded Google Cloud partnerships, these factors, coupled with analyst price target reductions, have outweighed positive sentiment. The company also faces concerns about decelerating revenue growth and challenges in monetizing AI investments.

feed.title: Jennison Associates LLC Sells 31,989 Shares of CMS Energy Corporation $CMS
feed.summary: Jennison Associates LLC has reduced its stake in CMS Energy Corporation by 1.9%, selling 31,989 shares and now holding 1,620,141 shares valued at approximately $113.3 million. Meanwhile, institutional investors collectively own about 93.57% of CMS stock, while company insiders have sold over 20,000 shares worth around $1.58 million in the last 90 days. CMS Energy recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.57 per share.

feed.title: Jennison Associates LLC Raises Stock Holdings in Alliant Energy Corporation $LNT
feed.summary: Jennison Associates LLC significantly increased its stake in Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:LNT) by 92.5% in the fourth quarter, bringing their total holdings to 1,805,214 shares valued at approximately $117.36 million. This move is part of broader institutional investment, with various hedge funds modifying their positions in the company, which now has 79.9% institutional ownership. Alliant Energy also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.535 and reported strong financial results, surpassing EPS estimates and showing a 9% year-over-year revenue increase.

feed.title: Caterpillar Posts Strong Q1 on Construction and Power Growth
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter earnings, driven by robust sales of construction machinery and equipment for AI data centers. The company’s per-share profit significantly beat analyst estimates, leading to a rise in pre-market trading. This growth is largely attributed to the AI buildout, increasing demand for their power and energy solutions, and a record order backlog.

feed.title: ProQR Announces Nomination of Dr. Lykke Hinsch Gylvin to its Board of Directors
feed.summary: ProQR Therapeutics N.V. (Nasdaq: PRQR) has nominated Dr. Lykke Hinsch Gylvin, Chief Medical Officer at Boehringer Ingelheim, to its Board of Directors. Dr. Gylvin brings over 20 years of global leadership experience in drug development across various therapeutic areas. Her nomination will be submitted for shareholder approval at the company's upcoming Annual General Meeting.

feed.title: Lake Oswego man sentenced after breaking into storage units, hauling off bins full of loot
feed.summary: Joseph Patrick Doherty of Lake Oswego has been sentenced to over three years in prison after pleading guilty to first- and second-degree burglary. Doherty was caught after leaving court paperwork with his name and address at a Public Storage facility he burglarized. He targeted both storage units and small businesses, stealing valuable items and causing significant financial strain.

feed.title: PVH Corp declares $0.0375 dividend
feed.summary: PVH Corp has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.0375 per share. This dividend will be payable on June 28, 2024, to shareholders of record as of June 7, 2024. The total dividend payment will amount to approximately $2.20 million.

feed.title: PennyMac Investor Probe Deepens After 33% Stock Plunge: What PFSI Holders Need To Know
feed.summary: PennyMac Financial Services (NYSE:PFSI) is facing deepening investigations from two shareholder law firms, Rosen Law Firm and Schall Law Firm, after its stock plunged 33.3% following a January earnings report. The probes focus on potential misleading statements or omissions related to the company's servicing segment, which saw a significant drop in pretax income due to increased mortgage servicing rights (MSR) runoff. Investors are now keenly awaiting PennyMac’s first-quarter earnings report on May 5 for updates on whether production growth can offset these servicing setbacks.

feed.title: ProQR Nominates Boehringer Ingelheim CMO Lykke Hinsch Gylvin to Board to Support Next Growth Phase
feed.summary: ProQR Therapeutics has nominated Dr. Lykke Hinsch Gylvin, CMO of Boehringer Ingelheim, to its board of directors as an independent non-executive member, pending shareholder approval. This move aims to strengthen ProQR’s board with extensive global drug-development expertise, crucial as the company advances its Axiomer RNA editing pipeline. Dr. Hinsch Gylvin's experience is expected to bolster ProQR's long-term growth strategy and enhance investor confidence.

feed.title: News | MGM Resorts continues to face headwinds in Las Vegas while China profits outperform
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International reported mixed first-quarter 2026 results, with Las Vegas Strip properties seeing slight top-line growth but an 8% decline in segment adjusted EBITDAR. The company is innovating in Las Vegas with new technology and all-inclusive packages, attracting first-time visitors. Meanwhile, MGM's China properties significantly outperformed, contributing to a consolidated net revenue increase of 4% year-over-year.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Downgrades Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) to Neutral
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has downgraded Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) from an "overweight" to a "neutral" rating, setting a $725.00 price objective. This comes amidst mixed analyst sentiments, with several other firms maintaining or boosting their "buy" and "outperform" ratings, resulting in a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock. Despite Meta posting strong Q1 earnings that beat expectations, the downgrade and a subsequent share drop were attributed to a significant increase in projected capital expenditures and ongoing losses from Reality Labs.

feed.title: Materion (NYSE:MTRN) Given New $185.00 Price Target at KeyCorp

feed.title: B. Riley Financial Downgrades Peabody Energy (NYSE:BTU) to Neutral
